rationale: No qualitative escalation in the Russia-Ukraine war or EU energy situation; distant events dominate headlines with no direct bearing on Polish daily life.

top_events.title: Trump says US and Iran reached a 'great settlement'
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could ease oil market tensions, indirectly benefiting European energy prices and reducing one geopolitical risk factor for Poland.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening China-North Korea alignment has indirect implications for the broader Russia-aligned axis, relevant to Poland's security calculus but no immediate change.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño may affect European weather patterns and agricultural output, with modest indirect impact on Polish food prices and energy demand.
